stemHtml: Choose the statement which correctly defines an “illusion”:

options.a: It is an incorrect or incomplete picture of the situation caused by deficient sensory organs (e.g., colour blindness or hearing loss).
options.b: It is a failure to detect a flawed mental picture, caused by a tendency to seek information which confirms one’s current impression.
options.c: It is an incorrect mental model caused by a lack of specific knowledge stored in long-term memory.
options.d: It is a false impression which is generated when the brain misinterprets sensory information.
